name: Pearl Jam
bio: Pearl Jam's catalog continues to generate meaningful revenue through rock streaming, live-culture relevance, and durable album-era loyalty.
notable_for: Arena-scale rock catalog, 1990s cultural staying power, and unusually committed fan demand.
career_highlight: Their early catalog remains central to rock playlists and catalog listening worldwide.
revenue_drivers: Core songs stream consistently across classic-rock and alternative playlists.
Strong fan loyalty supports deep catalog listening beyond just the hits.
Touring reputation reinforces long-term catalog value.
